name: io.realvirtual.mcp
description: Unity MCP server (fork of realvirtual's) with first-class Game Creator 2 authoring over MCP. Lets AI agents control the Unity Editor and build GC2 logic — instructions, triggers, name variables, quests, dialogues — through the MCP protocol via WebSocket.

samples.description: Runtime GC2 feature: parse a text script into a branching, playable Dialogue with speakers resolved by name from a Name Variables cast. Requires GC2 Core + Dialogue.
